_meta.update_policy: Edit tokens.yaml first, then mirror into .json and .css.

brand.name: 3iQ Corp — #MakeItMatter
brand.positioning: 3iQ's employer brand campaign — a unifying theme for talent attraction, cultural consistency, and internal engagement.
brand.hq: 161 Bay Street, Suite 2700, Toronto, Ontario, Canada M5J 2S1

primary.family: Neue Haas Grotesk Display, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif

logo.clearspace: Minimum clearspace around the MIM logo equals the height of the hashtag (#) symbol.
logo.color_rule: One colour only — Navy (#080E23) on light surfaces, White (#FDFEFA) on dark surfaces.

highlights.description: 12 hand-drawn highlight/underline shapes, each in 11 colour variants. Use to emphasize 'matters' in copy.
highlights.original_artwork_mandate: ALWAYS use the original PNG files. Never approximate, simulate, or redraw highlights using CSS, SVG, gradients, or any other method. The hand-drawn artwork must be reproduced exactly as the artists created it — no variation from the originals.
highlights.placement_rule: The PNG highlight files must never be used to cross words out. Position them beneath/behind text only. The actual PNG files can slightly overlap the bottom of letterforms but must never fully cover, strike through, or obscure the word. Text must always render on top and remain fully legible.

voice.tone: Warm, purposeful, human. Speaks to what drives people at 3iQ — purpose, collaboration, growth, and impact.
signature_phrases: If you're driven by purpose, you're already one of us.
Celebrate those who raise others higher.
It's not just what we build, it's how we build it together.
We don't wait for the future, we build it.
narrative_lines: That what you do here matters.
And the difference we make together, really matters.
do: Pair the MIM logo with approved messaging and highlights.
Vary highlight styles for a natural, hand-drawn feel.
Complement the corporate brand — never replace it.
Ask the user design questions before producing visual artifacts (light/dark background, format, dimensions, messaging, highlight preferences).
Always use the original artist-created highlight PNGs — never simulate or approximate them.
dont: Remove the underline from the #MakeItMatter logo.
Add word spaces — it is #MakeItMatter, not #Make It Matter.
Use highlight colours on the logo.
Distort, rotate, or stretch the logo.
Use this as a replacement for the 3iQ corporate brand.
Simulate hand-drawn highlights with CSS, SVG, or any non-PNG method.
Position the PNG highlight files over text so they cross out, strike through, or fully overlay words — they can slightly overlap but must never obscure.

values.name: Lead with Kyodo
values.expression: We before me. Collaboration makes it matter.

values.name: Stay Humble
values.expression: Curiosity, learning, and listening make our work matter.

values.name: Elevate Others
values.expression: Recognition and empowerment show others matter.

values.name: Innovate & Adapt
values.expression: Our ability to lead makes us matter.

values.name: Follow Through
values.expression: Delivering on promises proves it matters.

disclaimer.standard: #MakeItMatter is 3iQ Corp's employer brand campaign. It complements the corporate brand and is used for talent attraction, cultural engagement, and internal communications.
disclaimer.footer: © 2026 3iQ Corp. All rights reserved. #MakeItMatter is a 3iQ employer brand initiative.
